div.class: o_control_panel d-flex flex-column gap-3 px-3 pt-2 pb-3
o_control_panel_main d-flex flex-wrap justify-content-between align-items-center gap-2 flex-grow-1
d-flex flex-column justify-content-center align-items-center flex-grow-1 p-5 text-muted
row row-cols-2 row-cols-sm-3 row-cols-md-4 row-cols-xl-5 g-3

div.div: No add-ons available for selected products.

div.class: position-fixed top-0 start-0 w-100 h-100 d-flex justify-content-center align-items-center
d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center p-2 border rounded

select.option: How did you hear about us?

div.div: IMPORTANT: The zip code MUST MATCH the EVENT ZIP CODE (not billing). If not listed, verify franchise territory ownership via intranet or contact corporate.
This zip code is not in our service area. Please verify with corporate before proceeding.

div.p: For your protection we offer a damage waiver for 10% of your rental fee. We will waive any damage that happens to our equipment during your rental excluding intentional damage or theft.

select.option: Yes - I want to be protected against accidental damage (10%)
No - I will take full responsibility for accidental, intentional, & theft during my rental period

div.p: Are you having your event at a park, church, school or business (anything non-residential)?

If your reservation is cancelled due to inclement weather, your deposit can be applied to a future date. This rain check will not expire. Once equipment is delivered, there will be no rain check or refunds. Customer agrees to full policy on our website at freedomfunusa.com.

div.label: I agree to the weather and payment policy above

div.p: We do not set up on rock or gravel. You will need to provide a separate circuit for each item ordered. Units must have electricity located within 50' ft.

div.label: I agree to the setup and electrical terms above

div.class: d-flex flex-column justify-content-center align-items-center flex-grow-1 p-5 text-center
div.p: Your rental order has been successfully created.

div.t: Deposit invoice ( %) created and sent to customer.
Full invoice created and sent to customer.
